name: copilot-cmux-status-hook
description: Copilot CLI extension that mirrors agent working/done state into CMUX.

scripts.lint: node --check extension.mjs && find lib scripts test e2e -name '*.mjs' -exec node --check {} \; && find hooks -name '*.sh' -exec bash -n {} \; && node -e "JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('examples/copilot-hooks.imessage.json', 'utf8'))"

author: Andrew Doing
